title: STAR Architecture Decision - Cognizant OCR plus NLP Pipeline
content:
Architecture Decision: OCR-first plus domain NLP for document intelligence

Situation:
- Enterprise document sets included scanned, noisy, and heterogeneous formats.
- Downstream classification and extraction quality depended heavily on input normalization quality.

Task:
- Select an architecture that can robustly process mixed document formats at production scale.

Action:
- Chose OCR-centered preprocessing followed by domain-adapted NLP extraction and classification stages.
- Added quality checks between stages to reduce error propagation.
- Integrated outputs into API and operational pipelines for downstream consumers.
- Tuned for workload volume, reliability requirements, and domain constraints.

Result:
- Source context highlights better extraction consistency and operational efficiency in enterprise workflows.
- Decision became a repeatable pattern for high-volume document intelligence delivery.
